source_code:
# source: https://github.com/ipython/ipython/issues/12745
# repo: ipython/ipython
# title: NameError: name 'sys' is not defined
# 
# Got the below error when I use this code snipets,
# Error:

In [1]: from elasticsearch import Elasticsearch
In [2]: es = Elasticsearch(hosts=[{"host": "host.docker.internal", "port": 9200}],
   ...:                     max_retries=30,
   ...:                     retry_on_timeout=True,
   ...:                     request_timeout=30)
In [3]: es.info()
expected_fix_hint: Fix argument type/shape; check signature changes between library versions.
